title: VMware India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: VMware India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
VMware India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About VMware India Advisory Limited:
VMware India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India Advisory Limited!
